title: lamium album subsp. album
intro: Lamium album subsp. album, also known as white deadnettle, is a flowering plant that belongs to the mint family Lamiaceae. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe wounds, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues. The health benefits of Lamium album subsp. album include its ability to boost the immune system, reduce stress, and promote digestion, making it a popular herbal remedy for various ailments. Herbal preparations of Lamium album subsp. album can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed orally to harness its medicinal properties.
